mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, sort_order, is_visible, width, align, dict_type, create_time, update_time FROM report_field WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_field (report_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, sort_order, is_visible, width, align, dict_type, create_time) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldLabel}, #{fieldType}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{width}, #{align}, #{dictType}, NOW())

INSERT INTO report_field (report_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, sort_order, is_visible, width, align, dict_type, create_time) VALUES
(#{field.reportId}, #{field.fieldName}, #{field.fieldLabel}, #{field.fieldType}, #{field.sortOrder}, #{field.isVisible}, #{field.width}, #{field.align}, #{field.dictType}, NOW())
